title: Diamond Banking
description: A server friendly diamond-based economy with traceability.
body:
## Diamond Banking Mod

### Overview
Diamond Banking is a server friendly economy and lightweight shop mod that aims at providing players with an easy shopping and trading expierence. With this mod you no longer need ender chests at shops nor do you need a large shop with chests and signs to show what they sell.

This mod is also designed to appeal to server admins as every transaction between players or player shops are logged on both the server and on both players, so should there ever be a dispute the admins can easily and effectively fetch the transaction to see what is true.

### Features
- A simple economy system based upon the long standing use of diamonds as currency.
- A shopping system that uses signs as the shop and chests for stock storage.
- Each players diamond bank account is tied to their game profile id which is unique.
- An effective transaction log feature aimed to assist with any player disputes.

## For a more thorough guide please see the Wiki
